skills.description: A comprehensive skill for building scalable data pipelines, modern data warehouses, and real-time streaming architectures using tools like Apache Spark, dbt, Airflow, and cloud-native platforms.
trigger_conditions: Designing batch or streaming data pipelines
Building data warehouses or lakehouse architectures
anti_triggers: You only need exploratory data analysis
You are doing ML model development without pipelines
You cannot access data sources or storage systems

skills.description: A comprehensive guide for designing, implementing, and optimizing scalable data pipelines using various tools and technologies.
trigger_conditions: Working on data pipeline architecture tasks or workflows
or checklists for data pipeline architecture
anti_triggers: The task is unrelated to data pipeline architecture
You need a different domain or tool outside this scope

skills.description: A comprehensive database workflow bundle covering SQL, NoSQL, database design, migrations, optimization, and data engineering.
